race.comment: KEEN TO EXCEED (1) smart type who made an encouraging debut when he came out of the pack late for a solid second to Bangkok Hottie over 1100m at this track. Since fitted with a dominant trial win over 1045m at Randwick. Well drawn and shapes as a genuine top-three player. THYME TO GO (9) imposing I Am Invincible filly resuming. Showed ability in her first prep and looks to have come back even stronger with the two sound trials. Cross-over nose band goes on and will prove hard to hold out from the low draw. UNCERTAIN GLORY (7) kept safe in betting on debut when she drifted back before rounding them up with ease to salute over 1000m at Warwick Farm. Should be even stronger out to the 1200m and stays in the mix. FRIENDLY FIRE (2) struck trouble at the start and launched late from back in the field with an eye catching second over 1200m at Wagga on debut. Meets a tougher field today and gets his chance from the inside draw. GLENORCHY (5) nice colt on debut. Trialed well and worth thought.
